name: darkanchor nginz agent
description: Agent card for the darkanchor nginz product family. Provides product information, documentation, and module reference for nginz (native nginx modules), nginz-njs (Gleam→njs policy layer), and nginz-token (AI gateway control).

skills.name: Product Information
skills.description: Explains nginz, nginz-njs, and nginz-token: licensing, capabilities, and module listings.

skills.name: Documentation Reference
skills.description: Lists and describes all 27 native modules (nginz) and 13 scripted modules (nginz-njs) with links to their documentation pages.
